title: Mouthwatering Australian Kangaroo Skewers
description: A fresh and crunchy Australian dish featuring plum jam and deglaze, perfect for adventurous eaters, this paleo-friendly recipe is a must try for anyone looking to spice up their barbecue game.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together plum jam, olive oil, garlic, ginger, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the kangaroo meat to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated kangaroo meat onto the soaked bamboo skewers.
Grill the skewers for 4-5 minutes per side, or until the meat is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
While the skewers are cooking, prepare the deglaze by heating a tablespoon of olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add a tablespoon of plum jam to the saucepan and stir to combine with the olive oil.
Bring the deglaze to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened slightly.
Brush the deglaze over the cooked skewers and serve immediately.
